name: eval-3-ai-assist-hybrid-zone
query: I spend about 4 hours a week summarizing candidate interviews for Krysta's recruiting work. Should I delegate this?
expected_behavior: Evaluates against four criteria: repetitiveness (weekly, recurring = high), judgment required (medium — pattern recognition over transcripts, but candidate-specific context matters), error tolerance (medium — a bad summary misleads the hiring decision but is recoverable), data sensitivity (medium — candidate PII)
Produces recommendation: AI-Assist — the sweet spot. Full automation risks missing candidate-specific nuance; keeping fully human wastes 4 hrs/week.

Surfaces a specific AI-assist design: structured prompt that summarizes against a fixed rubric (skills demonstrated, communication style, concerns raised, next-step recommendation), produces a draft the user edits before handoff to Krysta
Recommends chaining to prompt-architect to build the structured prompt, then prompt-to-skill to make it permanent
Flags the PII handling concern (don't store transcripts in arbitrary chat logs)
Estimates time savings: 4 hrs/week → ~1 hr/week editing drafts
failure_modes_to_check: Recommends full automation and misses the candidate-specific judgment concern
Recommends keep-human and wastes the obvious time savings
Does not surface the chain to prompt-architect + prompt-to-skill
